title: Battle of Geonosis (Galactic Civil War)
content:

**1 derelict [[Core ship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Core Ship]] |forces4= |casual1=*1 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] *''Rescue 1'' |casual2=*The LAAT/i *All [[Imperial escort carrier (storm commando)|Imperial escort carriers]] and their crews *Stormtroopers *TIE fighters *TIE interceptors *TIE bombers |casual3=*Presumably all battle droids |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Who are you?!''"
"''You know who I am. The Empire maintains order. People like you disrupt that order.|Wedge Antilles and the defector Sarkli|}} This '''battle''' took place at around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] on and in orbit of the planet '''[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]'''. The battle occurred in the wake of the [[Raid at Bakura|abduction]] of a number of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] from a [[Bakura Imperial Prison|prison]] over [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] of the Alliance tracked the unidentified captor to Geonosis, where [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was deployed to secure the hostages. As soon as the battle began, it was already a disaster for the Alliance. An ambush, led by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spy [[Sarkli]], took place against the Rebel fleet, forcing the surviving rescue transports to retreat into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. After [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] of Rogue Squadron confronted Sarkli, who was in command of an [[Imperial escort carrier (storm commando)|Imperial escort carrier]], both Sarkli and Antilles crash landed in the canyons on the planet. They fought their way through [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|Separatist holdouts]]. Eventually, Antilles was able to escape back to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] using an old [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi Starfighter]]. ==Prelude== After its disastrous defeat at [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] was in need of victories. The ace [[Pilot/Legends|fliers]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] were sent to recover [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Bakura Imperial Prison|prison facility]]. After recovering them, one of their transports was stopped and boarded by Imperial [[Storm commando/Legends|Storm commandos]], who subsequently took the scientists to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. A Rebel [[Listening post/Legends|listening post]] intercepted transmissions, and they suspected it came from the ship from Bakura, which had destroyed a rebel transport. ==The battle== ===Arrival of Rogue Squadron=== [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] sent three of Rogue Squadron's [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing starfighters]] were assigned the mission to rescue the scientists, and led four [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transports]], including [[Rescue 1 (GR-75 medium transport)|Rescue 1]], to Geonosis. The Rogues also had additional support craft on their way. Upon arrival in the Geonosis [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field, three [[Imperial escort carrier (storm commando)|escort carriers]] performed a surprise ambush. Antilles ordered the rescue transports to abort their mission, but the lead escort carrier took out a transport while the other two [[Carrier/Legends|carriers]] retreated. The abductor revealed himself to be [[Sarkli]], former member of Rogue Squadron and the Rebel Alliance. Antilles managed to destroy his escort carrier, but Sarkli and a few garrisons of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] managed to survive the blast by using the ship's [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]], taking casualties in the process due to collisions with asteroids. Antilles's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] was caught in the explosion which destroyed his starboard [[Stabilizer/Legends|stabilizer]] and sent him crashing in a canyon near a derelict [[Core ship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Core Ship]]. ===Ground operations=== {{Quote|System malfunction...Exterminate!|Battle droids|}} Numerous [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] on Geonosis had been cut off from the deactivation beacon at the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. When the survivors of the carrier crash-landed on the planet, several stormtroopers were killed by "[[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|native]]" droids settled in the [[Geonosis droid factories/Legends|area]], and suffered system malfunctions. As Antilles crashed, they turned their blasters on him. In an attempt to flee the droids, Sarkli used a crashed, but working [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] to escape the area. Antilles now had to deal with waves of battle droids, as well as the survivors from the carrier. Antilles' [[Unidentified R5 unit (Wedge Antilles)|R5 unit]] spotted something and started rolling down the canyon. Antilles protected the droid as it rolled forward.''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' {{Gamemechanics}} While trying to navigate through the quagmire of the battle, Antilles threw several thermal detonator charges at the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and stormtroopers, wiping out several of them. Just before getting out of the chaos, Antilles investigated one of the escape pods from the downed escort carrier and discovered some advanced [[homing proton torpedo]]es inside, procuring them for future use. {{Endgame}} When Antilles finally came out of the chaos, Sarkli's gunship attacked him. Sarkli then taunted Antilles by telling him that, like Skywalker, he is a coward who is nothing without his forces. Using a dead stormtrooper's [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]], Antilles shot him down, although not before Sarkli vowed revenge. Antilles then found an old [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighter]] from the original [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle on Geonosis]] with good hull condition, but lacking power. Arfive transferred electricity and power from its circuits into the engine, reactivating it. Antilles and his R5 unit then escaped the planet. ===Retreat=== {{Quote|That escort carrier's shields are down!|General Madine to Antilles|}} Crix Madine's [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] came out of hyperspace and met up with Antilles. The remaining two escort carriers attacked and launched several TIEs, but Antilles found out the starfighter had a payload of [[Void-7 seismic charge/Legends|seismic charges]] and repelled them. He also took out [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] which were threatening the frigate. With assistance from the frigate and his wingmates, he dispatched the last two carriers, and jumped into hyperspace with an old, but still working, [[Syliure-31 hyperspace docking ring/Legends|hyperspace ring]] floating nearby. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Looks like an old hyperdrive unit for this relic! Arfive, can you get it working? Arfive, prepare to dock with it.|Wedge Antilles to Arfive|}} At the end of the battle the Rebels returned to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. Shortly afterward, Antilles was assigned to lead a [[Mission to Destrillion|strike]] at [[Destrillion]]. Sarkli survived his gunship being shot down by Antilles, and would resurface at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. ==Behind the scenes== {{Quote|Investigate the area around Geonosis for the fleeing Imperial escort carrier.|Mission briefing for "Relics of Geonosis"|}} This article was created based on a mission in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''. Seismic charges are not standard equipment for ''Delta''-7 starfighters, so it is not known if their presence in the mission is a personal upgrade or apocryphal. During the mission, the player can pick up the upgrade to complete the bonus objective. In addition, the [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide|strategy guide]] suggests using thermal detonators to destroy enemies in order to get a gold medal for the mission. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 3 ABY 2}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Geonosis (3 NSY) |es=Batalla de Geonosis (Guerra Civil Galáctica) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Geonosis (Galactic Civil War), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Geonosis]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]]
